UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the AverPay platform with enhanced Crisp-style metadata.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user, matching their auth UID.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

personalEmail.description: The personal email for account recovery.

profilePhoto.description: URL of the user's profile photo.

verificationIdUrl.description: URL of the user's verification ID document.

proofOfAddressUrl.description: URL of the user's proof of address document.

status.description: The user's account status, e.g., 'active' or 'pending'.

browserInfo.description: Detected browser and OS info (e.g., Chrome on Windows).

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.description: Represents an administrator of the platform.

isAdmin.description: A flag to confirm admin status.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents a single message in a chat thread.

definition.description: Stores user profiles and session metadata.
Stores messages for a specific chat conversation.
